cases.description: With base omitted, LOG defaults to base 10
cases.expected_note: Microsoft's LOG docs state 'If base is omitted, it is assumed to be 10' -- https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/log-function-4e82f196-1ca9-4747-8fb0-6c4a3abb3280

cases.description: Explicit base argument: log base 2 of 8
cases.expected_note: This is Microsoft's own documented example: '=LOG(8,2), The result, 3, is the power to which the base must be raised to equal 8' -- https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/office/log-function-4e82f196-1ca9-4747-8fb0-6c4a3abb3280

cases.description: Negative numbers are outside LOG's domain -> #NUM!
